userMessage: Set up CAN FD decode on B1 source CH2 500kbps nominal 2Mbps data phase ISO standard. Set up search on B1 for CAN FD error frames. Set edge trigger on CH2 rising 1.65V. Enable FastFrame 500 frames single sequence. After capture query FastFrame timestamp for all frames, save CH2 waveform as binary and screenshot.

response.text:
I can’t safely emit applyable TekAutomate JSON for this request.

Verified retrieval for this turn is still insufficient because:
- I do not have a materialized, verified SCPI command for the CAN bus source assignment on `B1` from `CH2`.
- The CAN FD `ISO standard` setting was not verified.
- The exact command needed to enable/apply the bus search for CAN/CAN FD error frames was not fully verified.
- The exact trigger level SCPI for `CH2` at `1.65 V` was not verified.
- Per your policy, I should not guess or emit SCPI-bearing steps without exact verified materialization.

What is verified from this turn:
- `BUS:B<x>:TYPe`
- `BUS:B<x>:CAN:BITRate`
- `BUS:B<x>:CAN:FD:BITRate`
- `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:TYPe`
- `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:BUS:SOUrce`
- `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:BUS:CAN:FRAMEtype`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:EDGE:SOUrce`
- `TRIGger:{A|B}:EDGE:SLOpe`
- `HORizontal:FASTframe:STATE`
- `HORizontal:FASTframe:COUNt`
- `ACQuire:STOPAfter`
- `ACQuire:SEQuence:NUMSEQuence`
- `ACQuire:STATE`
- `HORizontal:FASTframe:TIMEStamp:ALL?`

If you want, on the next turn I can build the full flow once the missing commands are verified and materialized.
